TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ca-te makakadumay a kanatal "Ba-a kamu, R√©publique du Tchad, A-la-powa kamu ō¨ŔÖŔáŔąōĪŔäō© ō™ōīōßōĮ‚Äé" pangangan han Ca-te "Tchad, ō™ōīōßōĮ‚Äé", u teban nu Bey-cow labuay a kanatal, saamisan mitules tu Lipi-ya, sawalian mitules tu Su-tan, nutimulan mitules tu cung-bey-makakadumay a kanatal, satip timula atuKe-may-lung,Nay-ci-li-ya mamabelaw, satip atu Ni-ze a kalalikeluh. śü•Śĺ∑ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(ś≥ēŤ™ě:R√©publique du Tchad (Tchad . nilaculan uyni a kanatal Ca-te-bu a taku ku sapangangan, labuay nu kanatal satalakaway a buyu' tini i Sa-ha-la likelikenay a Ku-si-san, angangan nu tukay atu satabakiay a tukay u En-cya-bey-na. Ca-te labuay nu kanatal pulung macaliway ku 200 a lasubu ku binacadan, Ba-a kamu atu A-la-pow a kamu u u makay ayaw nu kung-yen tu 7000 a mihcaan malingatu, i Ca-te kitizaan katuud tu ku muenengay nu tademaw. katukuh ayaw nu 9 se-ci zikuz, kakilukilul sa ku misakakuay a sutungu i Ca-te a Sa-ha-la a kakitizaan cumelak atu malawpes, namikuwan amin kuheni makayza tuyni a kitizaan milakuit tu Sa-ha-la nu makakadum a zazan. Ca-te i 1920 a mihcaan macalap nu Ba-kow, mala tungusay nu ce-taw Bay-cow. 1960 a hihcaan, Ca-te i Bu-lang-su-wa.Tung-pa-bey a pikelid makay Ba-kow miteked, nika Tung-pa-beyay a pikuwan caay kanamuh ku Mu-s-lin. sazikuzay i 1964 a mihcaan macacukah matenes ku nikangangayaw. 1979 a mihcaan, paculi tu ce-bu a sikuwang micalap tu En-cya-mey-na, pahezek tu nutimulan cen-bu a pikuwan. nika paculiay tu ce-bu sikuwangay nu mikeliday macaculi, sazikuzay ci Hay-san.Ha-pu-ley makademec tuyni a kangangayaw mala cung-tung tuway, nika i 1990 a mihcaan mapabelin nu sakakaay nu mikeliday ci I-te-li-s.Te-pi. 2003 a mihcaan malingatu, satipan a Su-tan masaukaynah tu Ta-bow,lilisay nu Ca-te caay caay kahapinang ku kawaw. kanahatu katuud ku sakaput ni Ca-te, nika ayaway a cung-tung ci I-te-li-s.Te-pi mikeiday tu midipatay tu kanatal a kawaw siicelang misakaku mikuwan, ayza u kanatal mahiza tu hinamalalebu ku cen-ce atu mizatengay tu amisumad tu kawaw nu hitay. Ca-te sa u pakuyucay i kitakit, u pihacengay nu maanubay a kanatal. makay 2003 a mihcaan malingatu, u siabal mapakutay tu nu kupa a sakakawawan, malaCa-te angangan a lalayan nu patahkal a kasikalisiw. ayaw nu kung-yen a mihcaan Ca-te saamisan a kakitizaan hekal nu mulangaway kapah aenengay nu tademaw, tawyaay a mihcaan tizaan a tademaw kalamkam sa katuud. Ca-te nu zuma kasatimanay maazih ku nu sumamaday a tuud, " angangan i Pow-al-ku-En-ney-ti-ti-pey-ti a kitizaan" mizateng tu ayaw nu kung-yen 2000 a mihcaan. satu u Ca-te masatancuyay a lala' izaw ku malukay mana'nelay a tademaw macaliway tu ku tusa malebut a mihcaan ku likisi. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČć7000ŚĻī, . uyni a kitizaan katenes mahiza tu u kasa macakatay a kitizaan. duduc tu nipatahkalan tu nalimaan a nisanga'an atu nakamuan nikiluan a likisi,uyni macakatay saayaway macakatay nu Sa-aw. kung-yen9 katukuh 10 se-ci, Sa-aw a tademaw saayaway patizeng tu Ca-te Sa-ha-la, nu kow-cow satenesay a kanatal Cya-ney a kanatal,16 se-ci tu zikuz, muculal ku mingaway tu Pa-ci-al a kanatal atu Wa-ta-i a kanatal, namahiza caay kasatezep ku lalamel nu kangangayaw nu tuluay a kanatal. Cya ney-mu-ti-kow atu kilul nu sakuwan tu nipatizeng sakay micaliway tuyni a kitizaan milakuit tu Sa-ha-la makuwan ku makakadumay a zazan. caay ku mialaway tu kuli dada', uyni situngusa mikuwan tu lala' nacaay kanayat katukuh i nutimulan a nalinabuan. 1883 a mihcaan katukuh 1893 a mihcaan, kasa hungti a kanatal kilul masulup tu nu Su-tan a tademaw La-pi-he.Cu-pay-al. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶a-t…ô makakadumaj a kanatar~…ĺ "ba-a kamu, **pubr~…ĺi*u…ô du t ¶ńßad, a-r~…ĺa-powa kamu ******* *****" paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶a-t…ô "t ¶ńßad, *****", u t…ôban nu b…ô- ¶ow r~…ĺabuaj a kanatar~…ĺ, saamisan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu r~…ĺipi-ja, sawar~…ĺian mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu su-tan, nutimur~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu ¶uŇč-b…ô-makakadumaj a kanatar~…ĺ, satip timur~…ĺa atuk…ô-maj-r~…ĺuŇč,naj- ¶i-r~…ĺi-ja mamab…ôr~…ĺaw, satip atu ni-z…ô a kar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß. *****(**:**pubr~…ĺi*u…ô du t ¶ńßad (t ¶ńßad . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ujni a kanatar~…ĺ ¶a-t…ô-bu a taku ku sapaŇčaŇčan, r~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° tini i sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônaj a ku-si-san, aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj atu satabakiaj a tukaj u …ôn- ¶ja-b…ô-na. ¶a-t…ô r~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** a r~…ĺasubu ku bina ¶adan, ba-a kamu atu a-r~…ĺa-pow a kamu u u makaj ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, i ¶a-t…ô kitizaan katuud tu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw. katukuńß ajaw nu * s…ô- ¶i zikuz, kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa ku misakakuaj a sutuŇču i ¶a-t…ô a sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa a kakitizaan ¶um…ôr~…ĺak atu mar~…ĺawp…ôs, namikuwan amin kuńß…ôni makajza tujni a kitizaan mir~…ĺakuit tu sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa nu makakadum a zazan. ¶a-t…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu ba-kow, mar~…ĺa tuŇčusaj nu ¶…ô-taw baj- ¶ow. **** a ńßińß ¶aan, ¶a-t…ô i bu-r~…ĺaŇč-su-wa.tuŇč-pa-b…ô a pik…ôr~…ĺid makaj ba-kow mit…ôk…ôd, nika tuŇč-pa-b…ôaj a pikuwan ¶aaj kanamuńß ku mu-s-r~…ĺin. sazikuzaj i **** a mińß ¶aan ma ¶a ¶ukańß mat…ôn…ôs ku nikaŇčaŇčajaw. **** a mińß ¶aan, pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu ¶…ô-bu a sikuwaŇč mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu …ôn- ¶ja-m…ô-na, pańß…ôz…ôk tu nutimur~…ĺan ¶…ôn-bu a pikuwan. nika pa ¶ur~…ĺiaj tu ¶…ô-bu sikuwaŇčaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ma ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi, sazikuzaj ¶i ńßaj-san.ńßa-pu-r~…ĺ…ô makad…ôm…ô ¶ tujni a kaŇčaŇčajaw mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč tuwaj, nika i **** a mińß ¶aan mapab…ôr~…ĺin nu sakakaaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i i-t…ô-r~…ĺi-s.t…ô-pi. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, satipan a su-tan masaukajnańß tu ta-bow,r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nu ¶a-t…ô ¶aaj ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč ku kawaw. kanańßatu katuud ku sakaput ni ¶a-t…ô, nika ajawaj a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i i-t…ô-r~…ĺi-s.t…ô-pi mik…ôidaj tu midipataj tu kanatar~…ĺ a kawaw sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč misakaku mikuwan, ajza u kanatar~…ĺ mańßiza tu ńßinamar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu ku ¶…ôn- ¶…ô atu mizat…ôŇčaj tu amisumad tu kawaw nu ńßitaj. ¶a-t…ô sa u pakuju ¶aj i kitakit, u pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu maanubaj a kanatar~…ĺ. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, u siabar~…ĺ mapakutaj tu nu kupa a sakakawawan, mar~…ĺa ¶a-t…ô aŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺajan nu patańßkar~…ĺ a kasikar~…ĺisiw. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn a mińß ¶aan ¶a-t…ô saamisan a kakitizaan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj kapańß a…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, tawjaaj a mińß ¶aan tizaan a tad…ômaw kar~…ĺamkam sa katuud. ¶a-t…ô nu zuma kasatimanaj maazińß ku nu sumamadaj a tuud, " aŇčaŇčan i pow-ar~…ĺ-ku-…ôn-n…ô-ti-ti-p…ô-ti a kitizaan" mizat…ôŇč tu ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan. satu u ¶a-t…ô masatan ¶ujaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° izaw ku mar~…ĺukaj mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ku tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan ku r~…ĺikisi. ********, . ujni a kitizaan kat…ôn…ôs mańßiza tu u kasa ma ¶akataj a kitizaan. dudu ¶ tu nipatańßkar~…ĺan tu nar~…ĺimaan a nisaŇča Ē~ °an atu nakamuan nikir~…ĺuan a r~…ĺikisi,ujni ma ¶akataj saajawaj ma ¶akataj nu sa-aw. kuŇč-j…ôn* katukuńß ** s…ô- ¶i, sa-aw a tad…ômaw saajawaj patiz…ôŇč tu ¶a-t…ô sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa, nu kow- ¶ow sat…ôn…ôsaj a kanatar~…ĺ ¶ja-n…ô a kanatar~…ĺ,** s…ô- ¶i tu zikuz, mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ ku miŇčawaj tu pa- ¶i-ar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ atu wa-ta-i a kanatar~…ĺ, namańßiza ¶aaj kasat…ôz…ôp ku r~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ nu kaŇčaŇčajaw nu tur~…ĺuaj a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶ja n…ô-mu-ti-kow atu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ nu sakuwan tu nipatiz…ôŇč sakaj mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tujni a kitizaan mir~…ĺakuit tu sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa makuwan ku makakadumaj a zazan. ¶aaj ku miar~…ĺawaj tu kur~…ĺi dada Ē~ °, ujni situŇčusa mikuwan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° na ¶aaj kanajat katukuńß i nutimur~…ĺan a nar~…ĺinabuan. **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, kasa ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ kir~…ĺur~…ĺ masur~…ĺup tu nu su-tan a tad…ômaw r~…ĺa-pi-ńß…ô. ¶u-paj-ar~…ĺ. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ca-te makakadumay a kanatal "Ba-a kamu, R√©publique du Tchad, A-la-powa kamu ō¨ŔÖŔáŔąōĪŔäō© ō™ōīōßōĮ‚Äé" pangangan han Ca-te "Tchad, ō™ōīōßōĮ‚Äé", u teban nu Bey-cow labuay a kanatal, saamisan mitules tu Lipi-ya, sawalian mitules tu Su-tan, nutimulan mitules tu cung-bey-makakadumay a kanatal, satip timula atuKe-may-lung,Nay-ci-li-ya mamabelaw, satip atu Ni-ze a kalalikeluh. śü•Śĺ∑ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(ś≥ēŤ™ě:R√©publique du Tchad (Tchad . nilaculan uyni a kanatal Ca-te-bu a taku ku sapangangan, labuay nu kanatal satalakaway a buyu' tini i Sa-ha-la likelikenay a Ku-si-san, angangan nu tukay atu satabakiay a tukay u En-cya-bey-na. Ca-te labuay nu kanatal pulung macaliway ku 200 a lasubu ku binacadan, Ba-a kamu atu A-la-pow a kamu u u makay ayaw nu kung-yen tu 7000 a mihcaan malingatu, i Ca-te kitizaan katuud tu ku muenengay nu tademaw. katukuh ayaw nu 9 se-ci zikuz, kakilukilul sa ku misakakuay a sutungu i Ca-te a Sa-ha-la a kakitizaan cumelak atu malawpes, namikuwan amin kuheni makayza tuyni a kitizaan milakuit tu Sa-ha-la nu makakadum a zazan. Ca-te i 1920 a mihcaan macalap nu Ba-kow, mala tungusay nu ce-taw Bay-cow. 1960 a hihcaan, Ca-te i Bu-lang-su-wa.Tung-pa-bey a pikelid makay Ba-kow miteked, nika Tung-pa-beyay a pikuwan caay kanamuh ku Mu-s-lin. sazikuzay i 1964 a mihcaan macacukah matenes ku nikangangayaw. 1979 a mihcaan, paculi tu ce-bu a sikuwang micalap tu En-cya-mey-na, pahezek tu nutimulan cen-bu a pikuwan. nika paculiay tu ce-bu sikuwangay nu mikeliday macaculi, sazikuzay ci Hay-san.Ha-pu-ley makademec tuyni a kangangayaw mala cung-tung tuway, nika i 1990 a mihcaan mapabelin nu sakakaay nu mikeliday ci I-te-li-s.Te-pi. 2003 a mihcaan malingatu, satipan a Su-tan masaukaynah tu Ta-bow,lilisay nu Ca-te caay caay kahapinang ku kawaw. kanahatu katuud ku sakaput ni Ca-te, nika ayaway a cung-tung ci I-te-li-s.Te-pi mikeiday tu midipatay tu kanatal a kawaw siicelang misakaku mikuwan, ayza u kanatal mahiza tu hinamalalebu ku cen-ce atu mizatengay tu amisumad tu kawaw nu hitay. Ca-te sa u pakuyucay i kitakit, u pihacengay nu maanubay a kanatal. makay 2003 a mihcaan malingatu, u siabal mapakutay tu nu kupa a sakakawawan, malaCa-te angangan a lalayan nu patahkal a kasikalisiw. ayaw nu kung-yen a mihcaan Ca-te saamisan a kakitizaan hekal nu mulangaway kapah aenengay nu tademaw, tawyaay a mihcaan tizaan a tademaw kalamkam sa katuud. Ca-te nu zuma kasatimanay maazih ku nu sumamaday a tuud, " angangan i Pow-al-ku-En-ney-ti-ti-pey-ti a kitizaan" mizateng tu ayaw nu kung-yen 2000 a mihcaan. satu u Ca-te masatancuyay a lala' izaw ku malukay mana'nelay a tademaw macaliway tu ku tusa malebut a mihcaan ku likisi. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČć7000ŚĻī, . uyni a kitizaan katenes mahiza tu u kasa macakatay a kitizaan. duduc tu nipatahkalan tu nalimaan a nisanga'an atu nakamuan nikiluan a likisi,uyni macakatay saayaway macakatay nu Sa-aw. kung-yen9 katukuh 10 se-ci, Sa-aw a tademaw saayaway patizeng tu Ca-te Sa-ha-la, nu kow-cow satenesay a kanatal Cya-ney a kanatal,16 se-ci tu zikuz, muculal ku mingaway tu Pa-ci-al a kanatal atu Wa-ta-i a kanatal, namahiza caay kasatezep ku lalamel nu kangangayaw nu tuluay a kanatal. Cya ney-mu-ti-kow atu kilul nu sakuwan tu nipatizeng sakay micaliway tuyni a kitizaan milakuit tu Sa-ha-la makuwan ku makakadumay a zazan. caay ku mialaway tu kuli dada', uyni situngusa mikuwan tu lala' nacaay kanayat katukuh i nutimulan a nalinabuan. 1883 a mihcaan katukuh 1893 a mihcaan, kasa hungti a kanatal kilul masulup tu nu Su-tan a tademaw La-pi-he.Cu-pay-al. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

patańßkar~…ĺ a kasikar~…ĺisiw. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn a mińß ¶aan ¶a-t…ô saamisan a kakitizaan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj kapańß a…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, tawjaaj a mińß ¶aan tizaan a tad…ômaw kar~…ĺamkam sa katuud. ¶a-t…ô nu zuma kasatimanaj maazińß ku nu sumamadaj a tuud, " aŇčaŇčan i pow-ar~…ĺ-ku-…ôn-n…ô-ti-ti-p…ô-ti a kitizaan" mizat…ôŇč tu ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan. satu u ¶a-t…ô masatan ¶ujaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° izaw ku mar~…ĺukaj mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ku tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan ku r~…ĺikisi. ********, . ujni a kitizaan kat…ôn…ôs mańßiza tu u kasa ma ¶akataj a kitizaan. dudu ¶ tu nipatańßkar~…ĺan tu nar~…ĺimaan a nisaŇča Ē~ °an atu nakamuan nikir~…ĺuan a r~…ĺikisi,ujni ma ¶akataj saajawaj ma ¶akataj nu sa-aw. kuŇč-j…ôn* katukuńß ** s…ô- ¶i, sa-aw a tad…ômaw saajawaj patiz…ôŇč tu ¶a-t…ô sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa, nu kow- ¶ow sat…ôn…ôsaj a kanatar~…ĺ ¶ja-n…ô a kanatar~…ĺ,** s…ô- ¶i tu zikuz, mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ ku miŇčawaj tu pa- ¶i-ar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ atu wa-ta-i a kanatar~…ĺ, namańßiza ¶aaj kasat…ôz…ôp ku r~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ nu kaŇčaŇčajaw nu tur~…ĺuaj a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶ja n…ô-mu-ti-kow atu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ nu sakuwan tu nipatiz…ôŇč sakaj mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tujni a kitizaan mir~…ĺakuit tu sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa makuwan ku makakadumaj a zazan. ¶aaj ku miar~…ĺawaj tu kur~…ĺi dada Ē~ °, ujni situŇčusa mikuwan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° na ¶aaj kanajat katukuńß i nutimur~…ĺan a nar~…ĺinabuan. **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, kasa ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ kir~…ĺur~…ĺ masur~…ĺup tu nu su-tan a tad…ômaw r~…ĺa-pi-ńß…ô. ¶u-paj-ar~…ĺ. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
